paper_title: Mean diameter of areolae and small pores measurements

methods.method_name: Image Analysis for Diatom Pore Measurement
methods.description: This method describes the process for measuring the mean diameter of areolae and small pores from SEM micrographs of diatom valves. Measurements are performed using an in-house MATLAB script on a selection of valves per culture. The method involves selecting valves, applying image analysis scripts, and calculating mean and standard deviation for both areolae and small pores.

steps.searchable_summary: Acquire scanning electron microscopy images of diatom valves.

steps.description: Select 15 valves per culture in SEM micrographs.
steps.searchable_summary: Select a subset of 15 valve images or regions of interest from SEM micrographs for each culture.

steps.description: Measure the diameter of areolae for the selected valves using an in house MATLAB script. The average of two selected axes per areola is used to determine the diameter.
steps.searchable_summary: Apply custom MATLAB script to measure areola diameter from selected valve images by averaging two axes.
outputs: Areola diameter measurements for individual areolae

steps.description: Calculate the mean diameter of areola across the 15 valves per culture. Error bars represent the standard deviations.
steps.searchable_summary: Calculate the mean and standard deviation of areola diameters from individual measurements across 15 valves.
inputs: Areola diameter measurements for individual areolae
outputs: Standard deviation of areola diameter per culture

steps.description: Measure the mean diameter of small pore for the selected valves via an in-house MATLAB script.
steps.searchable_summary: Apply custom MATLAB script to measure small pore diameter from selected valve images.
outputs: Small pore diameter measurements for individual pores

steps.description: Calculate the mean diameter of small pore across the 15 valves per culture. Standard deviations are used for error representation (implied).
steps.searchable_summary: Calculate the mean and standard deviation of small pore diameters from individual measurements across 15 valves.
inputs: Small pore diameter measurements for individual pores
outputs: Mean small pore diameter per culture
Standard deviation of small pore diameter per culture
